days.summary: Refined the launched home experience and session dropdown behavior with focused UI fixes in the Codebase home area.
frontendChangeBullets: Refined the launched home experience so entering an active project felt smoother after a workspace had been opened.
Improved Codebase home polish around the transition from home into the launched project state.
Fixed session dropdown behavior so selecting or switching sessions felt more reliable in the active workspace flow.
Reduced friction in session selection by tightening the dropdown interaction in the home and workspace context.
Made early project entry screens feel more stable with focused UI fixes in the Codebase home area.
backendChangeBullets: Stabilized the state flow behind launched home so the app could present active project context more consistently.
Improved session selection handling behind the dropdown, reducing cases where the selected session could feel out of sync.
Tightened the connection between home state and active workspace session state.
Addressed runtime assumptions around launching into projects after recent Codebase home changes.
Improved reliability of session-switching plumbing used by the home and workspace surfaces.

days.summary: Expanded work-item window support by wiring routes, window management, Tauri capabilities, and home UI entry points for the add-work-item flow.
frontendChangeBullets: Added a dedicated work item window flow for creating and managing work items from the desktop app.
Connected work item creation into home entry points so users could start project tasks from the main desktop experience.
Added route support for the add-work-item flow, allowing the new work item surface to open in the right context.
Improved window controls around work item creation so the new task flow felt like a first-class desktop workflow.
Made project planning more accessible by exposing the add-work-item experience through the Codebase home surface.
backendChangeBullets: Wired Tauri window-management support for the dedicated work item creation window.
Added permission and capability setup so the add-work-item flow could open consistently in the desktop runtime.
Connected route and window-manager plumbing needed to launch the work item window from the app shell.
Expanded backend-facing desktop configuration to recognize the new work item window surface.
Improved runtime integration between home actions, route handling, and desktop window creation for work item workflows.

days.summary: Continued shaping the work-item creation UI by updating the launched home page and the add-work-item window surface.
frontendChangeBullets: Improved the work item creation interface with clearer interactions between launched home and the add-work-item window.
Continued polishing the add-work-item experience so project setup workflows felt more intentional.
Adjusted the launched home page to better support users starting work item creation from an active project context.
Refined the new work item window surface after its initial wiring, reducing rough edges in the creation flow.
Made the project task creation path easier to understand by tightening the UI around its home and window entry points.
backendChangeBullets: Continued aligning the add-work-item window runtime with the launched home flow.
Improved the support path for opening work item creation from active project state.
Stabilized window-facing behavior for the newly introduced work item creation surface.
Tightened route and state assumptions around the add-work-item experience.
Kept desktop runtime wiring in sync with UI refinements to the launched home and work item window flow.

days.summary: Introduced project and repository management foundations, including project history hooks, repository actions, new issue windows, route and window-manager wiring, and additional home/sidebar UI refinements.
frontendChangeBullets: Introduced project and repository management foundations for browsing and working with saved projects.
Added project history loading UI hooks that made saved project activity available to richer home and workspace screens.
Added repository actions so users could interact with project repositories more directly from ORGII.
Expanded issue window routing, giving project work a more dedicated place to open and manage issues.
Refined home and sidebar UI so project, repository, and issue workflows were easier to reach.
Improved workspace sidebar presentation to support a broader project-management experience.
backendChangeBullets: Added project history data hooks to support loading and presenting saved project records.
Introduced repository action plumbing for the new project and repository management flows.
Wired issue window routing and window-manager behavior for opening project issue surfaces.
Expanded route infrastructure to support project, repository, and issue workflows from home and sidebar entry points.
Improved initialization support so home could connect users more directly to project and issue runtime flows.
Laid the data and routing foundations for a more complete project workspace model.

days.summary: Added a project list view backed by project-history data hooks, improving browsing and presentation of project history.
frontendChangeBullets: Added a project list view that made project history easier to browse from the desktop app.
Improved presentation of saved projects so users could scan prior work more naturally.
Gave project history a clearer list-based surface instead of relying only on lower-level data availability.
Improved the Codebase home experience by making saved project records more visible and actionable.
Made it easier for users to return to previous project work through a dedicated browsing view.
backendChangeBullets: Backed the project list view with project-history data hooks.
Improved project-history data loading so saved projects could be presented more reliably.
Strengthened the data path between stored project history and the new list UI.
Added structure for turning project history records into a browseable product surface.
Continued hardening project history as a reusable source for home and project-management workflows.

days.summary: Built out work-item and module management surfaces with API calls, selectors, status tags, drawers, tabs, styles, routing, and workspace input-area updates.
frontendChangeBullets: Built out work item management with selectors, status tags, drawers, and tabbed views.
Expanded module management surfaces so users could organize project work across modules and related tasks.
Improved issue tracker screens with richer controls for selecting and inspecting project work.
Updated workspace input areas so work item actions fit more naturally into active workspace workflows.
Improved reusable dropdown and status components used across project management screens.
Added styling for drawers, tabs, selectors, and status indicators to make work item management easier to read.
backendChangeBullets: Added API calls needed by the expanded work item and module management surfaces.
Wired routing for work item actions so project-management screens could open in the correct workspace context.
Connected workspace input updates to the data and action flow for work item management.
Expanded data support for selectors, statuses, modules, and work item tabs.
Strengthened issue tracker integration points used by the new drawers and tabbed detail views.
Improved shared component data contracts for dropdowns and status displays across project-management screens.

days.summary: Enhanced the issue tracker and work-item detail experience with priority and status selectors, breadcrumbs, module/work-item tabs, API additions, styles, and detail routing.
frontendChangeBullets: Enhanced work item detail pages with priority selectors, status selectors, breadcrumbs, and clearer navigation.
Added richer issue tracker controls for moving between modules, work items, and detail views.
Introduced module and work item tabs that made related project-management content easier to switch between.
Improved breadcrumb presentation so users could understand where they were inside project work.
Polished detail routing so work item and issue tracker pages opened in the right workspace context.
Improved status and priority interactions for users managing active project tasks.
backendChangeBullets: Added API additions needed by the enhanced issue tracker and work item detail experience.
Wired detail routing for work item pages so deep project-management views could load in context.
Improved data support for priority and status selector values in issue tracker workflows.
Connected module and work item tab state to the underlying project-management data flow.
Strengthened route handling between workspace pages, modules, work items, and detail screens.
Expanded backend-facing support for breadcrumbs and detail navigation metadata.

days.summary: Stabilized issue-tracker and home/project-history behavior, with fixes around chat resizing, status and attribute display, batch/date selectors, module/session/work-item tabs, and workspace panel layout.
frontendChangeBullets: Fixed chat resizing behavior so workspace conversations remained usable across different layouts.
Polished issue tracker status, attributes, batch controls, and date selectors.
Improved module, session, and work item tabs so project-management panels were easier to navigate.
Refined workspace panel layout around active chat and project-management content.
Improved home and project history stability after recent project-management updates.
Cleaned up attribute display details so work item and issue tracker information was easier to scan.
backendChangeBullets: Stabilized project-history behavior behind the updated home and project-management screens.
Improved state handling for issue tracker status, attributes, batch controls, and date selector data.
Tightened runtime support for module, session, and work item tab coordination.
Addressed layout-related assumptions in chat and workspace panel state handling.
Improved data consistency for issue tracker controls after recent selector and detail-page additions.
Continued hardening the relationship between home, project history, and active workspace panels.

days.summary: Expanded project, issue, subscription, and home UI flows while also fixing project-history presentation, touching selectors, drawers, tabs, routing, user state, and project metadata screens.
frontendChangeBullets: Expanded project and issue UI flows with updated selectors, drawers, tabs, and routing.
Added subscription-related interface updates to support account and plan visibility.
Fixed project history presentation so saved work appeared more clearly in the home and project browsing experience.
Polished home navigation to make project and issue workflows easier to reach.
Improved project metadata screens so users could understand and manage project details more effectively.
Updated user state presentation across the Codebase experience to better reflect account and project context.
backendChangeBullets: Improved project metadata handling behind the expanded project-management screens.
Updated user state handling to support account, subscription, and project context across the Codebase experience.
Adjusted routing support for project and issue flows that use selectors, drawers, and tabbed views.
Stabilized project-history data presentation after earlier list and home updates.
Expanded support for subscription-related state needed by account and plan visibility features.
Strengthened the data path between home, project history, issue tracker, and project metadata screens.

days.summary: Added an API checklist document to track integration or implementation tasks.
frontendChangeBullets: Added an API integration checklist to make upcoming product integration work easier to track.
Improved planning visibility for implementation and stabilization tasks that affect the product experience.
Created a clearer reference point for frontend and product work remaining around API-connected features.
Helped coordinate UI follow-up by listing integration tasks in a single checklist document.
Made it easier to reason about which product surfaces still needed API attention.
backendChangeBullets: Added checklist coverage for backend and API integration tasks that still needed follow-through.
Improved visibility into service connection work by documenting API-related implementation items.
Created a practical tracking artifact for runtime, data, and integration stabilization tasks.
Clarified backend-facing dependencies for upcoming product features that rely on API support.
Provided a shared reference for aligning frontend surfaces with the APIs and runtime behavior that power them.

days.summary: Advanced session-related functionality and prioritized checklist work, touching API clients, session history, header and link tooling, status selectors, home/issue-tracker pages, window styling, error boundary setup, and a lock/init artifact.
frontendChangeBullets: Advanced session management across session history, home, and issue tracker flows.
Improved header tooling and link interactions used while navigating project work.
Refined status selector experiences so project and issue states were easier to update and read.
Added stronger app error handling surfaces so unexpected failures could be contained more gracefully.
Polished window styling and editor layout for a cleaner workspace presentation.
Improved home and issue tracker pages as part of the prioritized checklist work.
backendChangeBullets: Updated API clients supporting session-related functionality and project workflows.
Improved session history plumbing so prior sessions could be loaded and displayed more reliably.
Added error boundary setup to contain unexpected app failures and protect the rest of the runtime experience.
Adjusted lock and initialization artifacts involved in app startup or session setup.
Strengthened link tooling and status-selector data handling behind project-management screens.
Continued backend-facing checklist work across session APIs, app state, and workspace initialization.

days.summary: Implemented session creation from work items and followed up with chat/session fixes across codebase APIs, project selection modals, project and session history, GitHub types, app state, and the empty-workspace window.
frontendChangeBullets: Added the ability to create sessions directly from work items.
Improved chat and session startup behavior when entering a workspace from project tasks.
Refined project and repository selection modals used before launching sessions.
Connected session history more tightly with project and work item workflows.
Improved the empty-workspace window for users starting from project tasks or repository selection.
Made work item pages feel more actionable by letting users launch focused sessions from them.
backendChangeBullets: Implemented the runtime flow for creating sessions from work items.
Updated codebase APIs that connect project tasks, repository context, and session startup.
Improved session history integration with project and work item records.
Adjusted GitHub-related types used by project and repository selection flows.
Refined app state handling around launching sessions from task-oriented entry points.
Fixed chat and session startup plumbing across project selection, empty-workspace, and work item flows.

days.summary: Fixed an unregistered call issue in application startup and Tauri menu integration code.
frontendChangeBullets: Fixed a startup registration issue that could prevent app commands from running correctly.
Improved desktop menu integration reliability during application launch.
Made menu-driven app behavior more dependable immediately after startup.
Reduced the chance that users would encounter inactive or missing desktop actions after opening ORGII.
Tightened the relationship between the visible desktop menu and the commands available to the app.
backendChangeBullets: Fixed an unregistered call issue in application startup code.
Improved Tauri menu integration so desktop commands were registered before use.
Stabilized launch-time command wiring for native app actions.
Addressed startup runtime behavior that could block app commands from executing correctly.
Strengthened the initialization path connecting Tauri menu setup with callable app functions.

days.summary: Fixed command-line execution and URL handling in workspace runtime flows, and corrected agent chat rendering for children object/string mismatches and selected-focus-file display.
frontendChangeBullets: Improved embedded page URL behavior so workspace views loaded and updated more reliably.
Corrected agent chat rendering when messages contained mixed structured and text content.
Improved selected focus file display inside chat context.
Fixed UI issues caused by children values arriving as either objects or strings in agent chat content.
Made workspace runtime flows feel more stable by tightening how command results and page navigation appeared to users.
backendChangeBullets: Fixed command-line execution handling in workspace runtime flows.
Improved URL handling for embedded workspace pages so runtime navigation behaved more reliably.
Adjusted agent chat data handling for messages that include structured children objects and plain strings.
Strengthened selected-focus-file plumbing so chat context could reflect the active file more accurately.
Improved command execution and embedded page coordination inside workspace runtime flows.
Reduced rendering failures caused by mismatched message payload shapes in agent chat.

days.summary: Improved repository creation and session startup flows by inferring repository names, preventing duplicate project-collection creation, creating sessions with initial messages, and fixing Monaco/editor highlighting integration.
frontendChangeBullets: Improved repository creation by inferring repository names during setup.
Prevented duplicate project collections from being created during project initialization.
Added support for starting sessions with initial messages already attached.
Fixed editor highlighting issues for a more stable code-viewing experience.
Improved Monaco/editor highlighting integration so code views were easier to read.
Made session startup smoother by carrying the user's initial prompt into the created session.
backendChangeBullets: Added repository-name inference to the repository creation flow.
Strengthened project initialization logic to avoid creating duplicate project collections.
Implemented session creation support with initial messages attached at startup.
Fixed Monaco/editor highlighting integration at the runtime boundary used by code-viewing screens.
Improved data handling between repository setup, project collection creation, and session startup.
Tightened session initialization so newly created sessions could include their first user message immediately.

days.summary: Focused on error handling experiments, rollback, dependency and maintainability updates, session-history refinements, empty-workspace and template-project fixes, branch merge integration, and editor hint-overlap cleanup.
frontendChangeBullets: Improved session history maintainability and presentation during ongoing workspace cleanup.
Fixed empty workspace and template project flows used when starting new work.
Cleaned up overlapping editor hint messages for better readability.
Refined error handling experiments and rollback work to keep user-facing app behavior stable.
Improved the template project startup experience so new workspace setup felt less fragile.
Polished editor guidance UI by ensuring hints no longer competed visually with each other.
backendChangeBullets: Updated dependencies and maintainability details supporting the workspace and session-history cleanup.
Refined error handling experiments and rolled back unstable pieces to preserve runtime stability.
Improved branch merge integration used by the workspace flow.
Fixed backend-facing assumptions in empty workspace and template project startup paths.
Cleaned up session-history implementation details while preserving the user-facing history experience.
Continued hardening project startup and editor-support plumbing after recent session initialization work.

days.summary: Closed the month with navigation updates, logout fixes in the header/menu, and cleanup of an obsolete conversation-log artifact.
frontendChangeBullets: Updated navigation behavior across home and workspace entry points.
Fixed logout behavior from the header and menu areas.
Improved account exit flows so users could sign out more reliably from visible navigation surfaces.
Cleaned up obsolete conversation log data to keep the app experience less cluttered.
Closed the month with focused navigation and menu polish around the main desktop shell.
backendChangeBullets: Adjusted routing and navigation support behind home and workspace entry points.
Fixed logout plumbing connected to header and menu actions.
Removed obsolete conversation log data from the app codebase.
Improved application state cleanup around sign-out actions.
Tightened the command and state flow between menu-triggered logout and the visible header logout path.
